parameters.name: filter[warehouse_id]
parameters.description: Filter stats by exact warehouse ID

parameters.name: filter[product_id]
parameters.description: Filter stats by exact product ID

parameters.name: filter[sku]
parameters.description: Filter stats by partial product SKU match

parameters.description: Filter stats by search across product SKU and name (partial match)

parameters.name: filter[stock_status]
parameters.description: Filter stats by computed stock status (in_stock, low_stock, out_of_stock, incoming, allocated)
